nodes.title: INPUT IMAGE — load your reference here
dynamqiue prompt
widgets_values:
## MULTI-PROMPT EDITING

This workflow supports per-section prompts — each section describes
what the character does during its ~5-second time window.

**Section timing at 81 frames / 16fps:**
- Section 1:  0-5s
- Section 2:  5-10s
- Section 3:  10-15s
- Section 4:  15-20s
- Section 5:  20-25s
- Section 6:  25-30s
- Section 7:  30-35s
- Section 8:  35-40s
- (Sections 9-12 continue in 5s increments)

**To edit prompts:** click the expand icon (↗) in the top-left of any section node.
Find the CLIPTextEncode nodes labeled Positive and Negative.

**For scripted batch injection:** use `set_svi_prompts.py`
(included in comfyui-rinsei repo). Edit section_prompts dict, run once,
load the output JSON. No subgraph diving required.

nodes.title: loras 3 ksampler
widgets_values:
## 2-KSAMPLER vs 3-KSAMPLER

**2-KSampler:** High pass (steps 0→3) + Low pass (steps 3→4)
**3-KSampler:** SVI anchor (step 0→1) + High (1→3) + Low (3→4)

Toggle at the top of the workflow.
2-KSampler is faster and recommended for RDNA2 12GB cards.

**RDNA2 step time reference (confirmed gfx1031):**
- Split attention, 480×832, Q3KM: ~28s/step
- Quad attention, warm cache: ~242-263s/step

To edit per-section prompts: click the ↗ expand icon in the top-left of any section node. Find the CLIPTextEncode Positive/Negative nodes inside.

For automated per-section injection without diving into subgraphs, use set_svi_prompts.py (included in comfyui-rinsei repo).
Load your High and Low GGUF diffusion models here. GGUF format is required on ROCm/AMD — fp8 safetensors will fail. See README at github.com/eviscerations/comfyui-rinsei

nodes.title: triple ksampler steps cfg true mode
widgets_values:
## KSAMPLER STEP VALUES

Do not change step values if using LightX2V LoRAs.
The step schedule is pre-configured for 4-step distillation sampling.

If running without LightX2V, increase steps to 20+ and adjust
the High/Low split accordingly.

nodes.title: double ksampler steps cfg false mode
widgets_values:
## DOUBLE KSAMPLER MODE

If a section produces artifacts or heavy brightness shifts,
switch that section's LazySwitchKJ to Double KSampler mode.
Adds one extra refinement pass at the cost of generation time.

nodes.title: LIGHTNING EDITION SVI
widgets_values:
## MODEL SETUP — AMD RDNA2 (comfyui-rinsei)

**Diffusion Models** — GGUF format required. fp8/safetensors crash on ROCm.
Load one HighNoise + one LowNoise GGUF pair:
- Q3_K_M recommended for 12GB VRAM cards (RX 6700 XT / 6650 XT)
- Example: `wan22RemixI2VGGUFV30_highQ3KM.gguf` + `_lowQ3KM.gguf`
- Model source: civitai.com/models/2472759

**Text Encoder** — GGUF via CLIPLoaderGGUF. fp8 safetensors will fail.
- `nsfwWanUMT5XXLGGUF_q5AndQ4KM.gguf` or `umt5-xxl-encoder-Q5_K_M.gguf`

**VAE** — `Wan2_1_VAE_fp32.safetensors`

**SVI LoRAs** (both required for temporal continuity):
- `SVI_v2_PRO_HIGH.safetensors` + `SVI_v2_PRO_LOW.safetensors`
- Source: huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/LoRAs/Stable-Video-Infinity/v2.0

Full setup guide: github.com/eviscerations/comfyui-rinsei
Original workflow: civitai.com/user/taek75799

nodes.title: TUTO
widgets_values:
## ADDING SECTIONS / STRUCTURE

**Output duration:** 12 sections × 81 frames ÷ 16fps ≈ 40 seconds raw

**To run fewer sections:** use Fast Groups Bypasser on unused sections.
Bypassed sections still pass the latent forward — they do not reduce duration.

**Switch between 2-KSampler and 3-KSampler mode** using the toggle at top.
2-KSampler recommended for RDNA2 12GB (faster, less VRAM pressure).

**Original workflow by taek75799**
civitai.com/user/taek75799

nodes.title: lora lightning
widgets_values:
## LIGHTX2V — 4-STEP SPEED LoRAs

This workflow uses LightX2V step-distillation LoRAs.
Do NOT change step count values — they are tuned for 4-step sampling.

Required:
- `wan2.2_i2v_lightx2v_4steps_lora_v1_high_noise.safetensors`
- `wan2.2_i2v_lightx2v_4steps_lora_v1_low_noise.safetensors`

**ROCm note:** SageAttention is bypassed (CUDA/Triton only).
Launch with `--use-quad-cross-attention` or `--use-split-cross-attention`.
See github.com/eviscerations/comfyui-rinsei for bat file.

nodes.title: SageAttention BYPASSED — ROCm incompatible (remove bypass on CUDA)
ModelPatchTorchSettings BYPASSED — remove bypass if issues occur

CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: (At 0 seconds: Medium shot, woman standing facing camera, soft rim lighting, hands relaxed at sides, neutral stoic expression, eyes steady on camera.) (At 1 second: She shifts weight slowly onto her right hip, left hand rising to rest at her waist, body curving naturally.) (At 2 seconds: Right hand lifts, one finger touching her lips in a slow deliberate shush gesture, eyes still locked on camera.) (At 3 seconds: She lowers the finger, both hands sliding to her hips, settling into the pose with quiet confidence.) (At 4 seconds: Shoulders roll back, chin rises slightly, expression neutral and commanding, owning the frame.)

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: blurry, distorted, deformed, extra limbs, morphing, low quality, static, flickering, duplicate, clone, color shift, motion artifacts

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: (At 0 seconds: Her sway begins, hands sliding from her hips slowly upward along her sides, body moving in a gentle fluid rhythm.) (At 1 second: Both hands continue rising, trailing up her ribcage as her body arches slightly.) (At 2 seconds: She arches her back, hands reaching into her hair, fingers running through it as her head tilts back.) (At 3 seconds: Hands lower back through her hair, she finds the camera with a slow warm genuine smile, open and inviting.) (At 4 seconds: Arms drift outward expressively, smile holding, body loose and easy, welcoming.)

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: blurry, distorted, deformed, extra limbs, morphing, low quality, static, flickering, duplicate, clone, color shift, motion artifacts

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: (At 0 seconds: The warm smile fades into a soft pout, lower lip pushing forward, brows drawing together gently, expression wistful.) (At 1 second: One hand rises slowly, a single finger pressing to her chin, head tilting as if deep in thought.) (At 2 seconds: She holds the pensive pose, eyes dropping downward, the other hand trailing up to her collarbone.) (At 3 seconds: The thinking finger lowers, both hands press flat against her chest, expression genuinely melancholy.) (At 4 seconds: She holds the sad expression, chin dipping slightly, arms crossing loosely, a moment of quiet vulnerability.)

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: (At 0 seconds: Her eyes lift back to camera, arms uncrossing and opening wide in an expressive sweep, expression shifting to warmth.) (At 1 second: A genuine smile spreads as both hands extend outward toward camera, an open and inviting gesture.) (At 2 seconds: She draws her hands slowly back, fingers trailing through the air as her arms lower.) (At 3 seconds: One hand goes to her hip, the other rises to touch her hair, lifting it then letting it fall, expression bright.) (At 4 seconds: Expression playful and warm, head tilting, body relaxed and at ease.)

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: (At 0 seconds: Expression shifts abruptly to fierce, eyes squinting hard, jaw setting, a low growl crossing her face.) (At 1 second: She plants both hands firmly on her hips, weight forward, posture challenging and direct.) (At 2 seconds: One hand lifts from her hip, a single finger pointing directly at camera, expression intensely confrontational.) (At 3 seconds: She drops the pointing hand back to her hip, squinted eyes holding, shoulders squared and powerful.) (At 4 seconds: Both hands slide from hips slowly up her sides, body rolling with fluid movement despite the fierce expression.)

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: (At 0 seconds: The fierce expression releases suddenly, eyes going wide and startled, hands flying upward in surprise.) (At 1 second: Wide eyes hold, hands raised, expression comic and open, a half-step back.) (At 2 seconds: She recovers, hands lowering, a mischievous grin spreading, shoulders shaking with quiet laughter.) (At 3 seconds: One hand rises and she touches her finger to her lips in a slow shush, the Elvis smirk pulling at her upper lip.) (At 4 seconds: She lowers the hand, weight settling on one hip, arms hanging loose and effortlessly cool.)

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: (At 0 seconds: She begins a slow turn to her left, one arm sweeping behind her theatrically as she moves.) (At 1 second: Full profile now, the extended arm lowering gracefully, body elongated and composed.) (At 2 seconds: Her near hand rises to her hair, fingers running through it as she holds the profile.) (At 3 seconds: She glances back over her shoulder at camera, expression soft and inviting, hand still in her hair.) (At 4 seconds: The hand lowers from her hair, trailing down her neck, over-the-shoulder gaze holding warmly.)

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)

(At 1 second: Full back to camera, fingers running through her hair, still glancing over her shoulder at camera.) (At 2 seconds: Hands lower from her hair, trailing down her sides as she holds the backward pose, gaze still on camera.) (At 3 seconds: Arms sweep slowly outward behind her, a wide open gesture, fingers relaxed.) (At 4 seconds: Arms draw back inward, body beginning the slow turn back toward camera.)

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)

(At 1 second: Both hands plant on her hips, she takes one deliberate step forward, expression fierce and unyielding.) (At 2 seconds: Second step, one hand leaving her hip to point at the camera, expression direct and confrontational.) (At 3 seconds: She drops the pointing hand, crosses both arms over her chest, chin dropping, staring up through her brows at camera.) (At 4 seconds: Arms uncross, hands sliding back to her hips, war face fully held, entirely commanding the frame.)

(At 1 second: Arms fall loose at her sides, expression softening to quiet genuine warmth.) (At 2 seconds: One hand rises, finger touching her chin thoughtfully, a small private smile appearing.) (At 3 seconds: The thinking hand lowers, both hands run upward along her sides one final time, body swaying gently.) (At 4 seconds: Hands settle at her waist, expression warm and settled, body stilling, the full range completed.)

(At 1 second: A final slow hip roll, both hands rising along her sides as she turns, body fluid.) (At 2 seconds: Three-quarter turn, she glances back over her shoulder, the same knowing smile from the opening.) (At 3 seconds: She faces fully away, arms spreading slightly outward in a quiet farewell gesture.) (At 4 seconds: Arms lower, she takes her first step away from camera, posture relaxed and confident.)

(At 3 seconds: She continues forward into the dark background, unhurried.) (At 4 seconds: Figure receding, soft rim lighting falling away, fade to dark.)
